items.title: 'Every person saved is a miracle': Families call to trapped loved ones in region devastated by Venezuela quakes
items.summary: Families keep vigil at buildings where they fear their loved ones are trapped, but face an impossible task to move heavy debris.

items.title: In Caracas, this feels like the hardest moment in Venezuela's modern history
items.summary: Rescue teams are working ceaselessly to reach those trapped under rubble. But as hope fades, anger is growing.

items.title: US and Iran exchange strikes and accuse each other of violating ceasefire
items.summary: Iran says it has launched retaliatory attacks at US infrastructure in Kuwait and Bahrain after the US said it hit multiple targets across Iran.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 別想逃！美國牧師懸崖推妻詐保奢糜度日 20年後被捕輕生亡

items.title: 中國遊客日本搭錯車獲「貼心服務」 駕駛室拍片炫耀1舉動引爆炎上
items.summary: 一名疑似來自香港的網友近日在社群平台分享一段影片，透露一家三口在日本旅遊時，原本計畫從大阪前往奈良，卻不小心搭錯車，坐上了近鐵特急列車「火之鳥」（HINOTORI）。沒想到這段本...…

items.title: 川普再祭滅國警告 若再開戰「伊朗將不復存在」
items.summary: 美國總統川普27日警告，若美軍因伊朗再次挑釁而被迫恢復軍事行動，「伊朗伊斯蘭共和國將不復存在」。就在他發表這番談話前後，美伊互控違反停火協議，並連續第2天互相發動軍事攻擊。 ...…
